prompts.description: Claude writes the Location Bible JSON from research pack + director vision. Enforces LocationBible v2 schema.
Variant of write-bible-system used by the pipeline orchestration flow.
Generates period facts, typical elements, and anachronism list for the location era.
Claude generates per-scene camera setups from Location Bible + mood states (coordinates, angles, composition).
Gemini Vision validates anchor image against Location Bible (era accuracy, negative list, key details, light direction).
Claude verifies anchor image matches Location Bible text description.
Claude checks Location Bible for period violations against the research pack.
Claude validates that all mood states align with the Location Bible base light state.
Claude compares a camera setup image against the anchor for composition and color continuity.
FAL.ai img2img prompt template for isometric 3D reference from floorplan. Template variables: {{location_name}}, {{era_clause}}, {{space_description}}. Overridable via prompt_override parameter.
prompts.ui_location: ReferencesPage → Isometric Reference → Generation prompt field

prompts.description: FAL.ai img2img prompt template for anchor location image. Template variable: {{space_description}}. Overridable via prompt_override parameter.
prompts.ui_location: ReferencesPage → Anchor Image → Generation prompt field

prompts.description: FAL.ai prompt template for per-setup reference images. Template vars: {{space_description}}, {{scene}}, {{mood}}, {{camera}}. Overridable per-setup via prompt_overrides[setup_id].
System prompt: instructs Claude to produce mood-state-v1 JSON delta from location bible + scene context. Caller stamps state_id/bible_id/scene_ids/act/time_of_day deterministically.
User-visible prompt template: rendered per scene_group inside create_mood_states. Vars: {{bible}}, {{light_base_state}}, {{scene_description}}, {{user_notes}}. Editable per generation.
prompts.ui_location: Mood States panel → Generation prompt field
